data.title: Multi-factor Authentication (MFA)
data.description: Adds an extra layer of security for user account verification.
data.technical_spec: Combines passwords with biometric or SMS-based authentication.

data.title: Web Application Firewall (WAF)
data.description: Protects against common web application attacks.
data.technical_spec: Filters and monitors HTTP traffic between a web application and the Internet.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Prevents distributed denial of service attacks, ensuring site availability.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes cloud-based mitigation services and CDNs.

data.title: Data Encryption at Rest
data.description: Secures stored data to guard against unauthorized access.

data.title: Automated Security Patching
data.description: Regular updates applied automatically to patch known vulnerabilities.
